description: Perform a Recency, Frequency, Monetary (RFM) analysis on the Chinook database located at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db. Create a table or view named 'customer_rfm' containing CustomerId, Recency (days since last purchase relative to 2014-01-01), Frequency (total invoice count), Monetary (total spend), and Segment. Assign segments based on the following priority: VIP (Monetary > $40.00), Loyal (Frequency >= 5), Churn Risk (Recency > 365 days), and Standard (all others). Export the results with headers to /home/ga/Documents/exports/rfm_segments.csv and save the SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/rfm_analysis.sql.
